title: Mid-Jordan reflection — chase the dream + don't lose the moment, Sept 2023
html:
TL;DR

  • One paragraph, written mid-trip in Jordan Sept 10 2023. The trip had Yahir thinking internally — the journal-as-mirror state.
  • Two simultaneous imperatives held in tension: "If you have a dream, why are you not chasing it?" + "Never, ever, lose sight of the moment. Of the people you love and those that love you."
  • Closing line: "Life is truly beautiful." — a Yahir anchor-phrase he repeats elsewhere in slight variations.

Key quote

"If you truly have big goals and desires for your life, pursue them. No holding back. You will regret doing anything other than full sending the grandest. But all the while never, ever, lose sight of the moment."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Mid-trip clearest statement of the full send vs stay present tension — the same dialectic he repeats in 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want (universe-multiplies-your-output) and 2024 12 14 departing china (chapter-end love letter).
  • Jordan was part of the Egypt Jordan arc — this note is the on-the-ground emotional output of that itinerary's planning.
  • Pairs with petra and the non negotiables for traveling concept — the trip was clearly meaningful enough to trigger journal-grade reflection.

Open questions

  • Where exactly in Jordan when written? Petra-adjacent?
  • Was he traveling with berkoo or solo at this point?

Wikilinks
